screening_ensemble.note: Ranks screening candidates and can hard-skip low P(pass_s1) graphs when enabled.

gbm_gate.note: Primary graph-structure gate inside the screening ensemble.

graph_predictor.note: Topology-aware sidecar used by the screening ensemble for pass, rank, loss, and induction hints.

learned_candidate_weights.note: Biases graph generation before compile/eval using notebook-derived weights.

screening_signal_weights.note: Biases op/template/motif weighting from screening outcomes and synergy signals during grammar construction.

learned_grammar_weights.note: Biases grammar category weights from attribution analytics.

investigation_predictor.note: Filters investigation-stage leaderboard candidates by predicted loss_ratio; does not influence graph generation.

top_reference_templates.name: depth_gated_block_matmul_norm
diagnosis: Template is producing Stage-1 survivors consistently.
Binding/copy behavior is weak relative to survivor rate.
Commonsense signal is near noise floor.
actions: Use as a reference family for nearby sparse templates.
Probe slot choices that preserve non-local token access.
Do not trust perplexity-only wins from this family.

top_reference_templates.name: attn_safe_division
diagnosis: Too little evidence to rank confidently.
Survivors train, but induction evidence remains weak.
Binding/copy behavior is weak relative to survivor rate.
actions: Backfill this template before changing weights.
Bias backfills toward longer-range token-interaction motifs.
Probe slot choices that preserve non-local token access.

backfill_priority_templates.name: graph_attn_sparse_ffn
diagnosis: Template consumes budget but rarely reaches Stage 1.
Fast-lane probes are positive despite poor short-run S1.
Most common failure mode is insufficient_learning.
actions: Downweight until slot and motif evidence improves.
Treat it as a slow starter and extend targeted backfills.

backfill_priority_templates.name: attn_residual_block
diagnosis: Template consumes budget but rarely reaches Stage 1.
Most common failure mode is insufficient_learning.
actions: Downweight until slot and motif evidence improves.

data_recommendations: Collect more slot-level evidence for sparse/building attention templates before any positive weighting.
Expand induction and binding coverage for families that pass S1 but remain weak on non-perplexity probes.
Prefer backfills with complete screening provenance so candidate/signal weighting can be validated on trusted rows.
Use reference families with repeated low-loss survivors to anchor nearby template backfills rather than globally raising weak families.
